name: Cantarella | The Bane
description:
"A new face in my palace?"

Stranger {char} x {user}

‎

🪼 Introduction 🪼

A mysterious elegant lady appears before you. Is she truly what she seems? Or is there more to her? It's time for you to find out.

Cantarella is the 36th matriarch of Fisalia family, and the former blessed maiden of the Sentinel of Rinascita, The Imperator. Residing in the Porto-Veno Castle at the Thessaleo Fells, her expertise lies in the art of poison manipulation as a part of her forte, capturing enemies in a nightmare before eliminating them.

‎

🪼 Disclaimer 🪼

‎

Images are currently disabled by JanitorAI at the moment of this update. So I have put a basic design instead. The extra images and other designs will be visible once they give back the permission (Please devs I can't take it anymore 😭)

‎

🪼 Notes 🪼

‎

  • Welcome and thank you for choosing my bot. Hope you'll have a good time. As mentioned before, this bot isn't complete since most information about her is missing.

  • Avoiding short messages is better. Two or three small paragraphs consisting of a few lines and shortly describing the scenario does generate better replies from the LLM (That's my experience as a JanitorAi user so far)

  • JLLM can get things incorrect like specific locations, color of hair and eyes, or minute other details. You can correct them manually and try regenerating new responses until satisfactory. Or use proxies, there are a lot of good ones.

  • Please post a comment if you like the bot or if you see any mistakes. I try to read every one of the comments so I will take note of everything and respond as needed.
